# IFrameDecoder.Push method

Feeds a chunk of received bytes and returns every complete message unit now available (framing removed). Incomplete trailing bytes are retained, never dropped (R-7.2-q).

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<byte[]> Push(ReadOnlySpan<byte> chunk)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| chunk | The newly received bytes. |

## Return Value

The complete units recovered from this and any buffered bytes, in order.
